TUESDAYS (BICEPS Standing Barbell Curs, Hannibal Strength of the week)
TODAY'S WARRIOR of the week goes to @francis_jamesnyc - James is officially "HANNIBAL STRENGTH CERTIFIED!" 

No Shortcuts.No Excuses.Just Work.
Todays workout of the day. Standing Barbell Curls- a true test of control,discipline, and raw strength.  This isn't about swinging weight...it's about owning every rep. This week's Hannibal Strength gym warrior is James putting in that work at Crunch Fitness. 

Focused.Locked in. Restlessness.
Every curl is a reminder: 
You don't build power by rushing..
